/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/test_ui_clarity_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/tests/test_ui_clarity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/QueueManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/TransferTask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/DriveMonitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/ProgressMonitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/ErrorManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/SettingsManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/AddTaskDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ui_clarity.dir/src/ParallelManager.cpp.o -o test_ui_clarity  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Test.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
